channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TIGLOB] T & I Global Ltd Closes Trading Window for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
T & I Global Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the year ending 31st March 2026, in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct. The trading window will remain closed for all Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ending on 31st March 2026. This move is to ensure fair trading practices and transparency in reporting.

  • Trading window closure for FY 2025-2026
  • Applicable to all Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives
  • Closure from 1st April 2026
  • Reopening 48 hours after quarterly and yearly financial results declaration
  • Measures to ensure fair trading practices and transparency

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: T & I GLOBAL LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [LGBBROSLTD] LG Balakrishnan & Bros Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Approve Q4 and FY2025-2026 Financial Results
item.description:
LG Balakrishnan & Bros Ltd has announced a board meeting scheduled for 30th April, 2026. The meeting will consider and approve the Audited Financial Results (both standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March, 2026. The company will also recommend the dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-2026. In addition, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities will be closed for all directors/ officers/ designated employees and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026 till the expiry of 48 hours after the announcement of its Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026.

  • LG Balakrishnan & Bros Ltd board meeting scheduled for 30th April, 2026
  • Consideration and approval of Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY2025-2026
  • Recommendation of dividend for FY2025-2026
  • Closure of trading window for dealing in the company's securities from April 01, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L.G.BALAKRISHNAN & BROS.LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SUDEEPPHRM] Sudeep Pharma Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure from 1st April 2026
item.description:
Sudeep Pharma Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons from 1st April 2026. The closure is in accordance with the Code of Conduct on Prevention of Insider Trading of Sudeep Pharma Limited and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the year ending on March 31, 2026. This means that all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are prohibited from dealing in the securities of the Company during this period. The date of the meeting of the Board of directors to approve the Audited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Results for the year ending on March 31, 2026, will be intimated separately.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons from 1st April 2026
  • Closure in accordance with the Code of Conduct on Prevention of Insider Trading and SEBI Regulations
  • Prohibition of dealing in securities for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives during the closure period
  • Closure to remain till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the year ending on March 31, 2026
  • Date of the Board meeting to approve the Audited Financial Results to be intimated separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sudeep Pharma Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GRANULES] Granules India Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Granules India Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window for all insiders, including designated persons and their immediate relatives. This closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and Granules Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The trading window will remain closed from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026.

  • Granules India Ltd. has closed the trading window for insiders.
  • The closure is in line with SEBI regulations and Granules Code of Conduct.
  • The trading window will remain closed from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GRANULES INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [VENLONENT] Venlon Enterprises Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Venlon Enterprises Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, effective from 1st April 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the financial results for the quarter ending 31st March 2026 are made publicly available.

  • Venlon Enterprises Ltd has closed the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure is effective from 1st April 2026.
  • This decision is in line with the Company's Code of Conduct and the SEBI regulations.
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the financial results for the quarter ending 31st March 2026 are made public.
  • The information has been hosted on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VENLON ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HMVL] Hindustan Media Ventures to Discontinue New OTTplay Subscriptions from March 31, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hindustan Media Ventures Ltd. has announced that it will discontinue new OTTplay subscriptions from March 31, 2026. The decision was made during a Board meeting on March 26, 2026. The existing OTTplay platform subscribers will continue to be supported. The OTTplay business contributes approximately 8% to the total revenue and 2% to the net worth of the company. The reason for the closure is that the expected timeline for achieving sustainable long-term profitability does not meet the required criteria.

  • Hindustan Media Ventures to discontinue new OTTplay subscriptions from March 31, 2026
  • Existing OTTplay subscribers will continue to be supported
  • OTTplay contributes approximately 8% to the total revenue of the company
  • Networth of OTTplay is negative, constituting 2% of the networth of the company
  • The decision was made due to the delayed timeline for achieving sustainable long-term profitability

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN MEDIA VENTURES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CINERAD] GTT Data Solutions Ltd Closes Trading Window for Quarter and Year Ended 31 March 2026
item.description:
GTT Data Solutions Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons, their immediate relatives, and those with whom they share material financial relationships. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and will last from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the financial results declaration will be informed separately.

  • GTT Data Solutions Ltd closes trading window for designated persons
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026
  • Trading to resume 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Date of Board Meeting for financial results declaration to be informed separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CINERAD COMMUNICATIONS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAMINFO] Raminfo Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Q1 2026
item.description:
Raminfo Ltd, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading, has announced the closure of the trading window for all Designated Persons, their Immediate Relatives, and all Connected Persons. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026, and will last until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited standalone & consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ending on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the approval of these results will be announced later.

  • Raminfo Ltd announces closure of trading window for Q1 2026
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026
  • Trading to resume 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results
  • Applies to Designated Persons, their Immediate Relatives, and Connected Persons
  • Date of Board Meeting for approval of financial results to be announced later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAMINFO LIMITED | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DIAMINESQ] Diamines & Chemicals Ltd. Receives Disclosure under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Diamines & Chemicals Ltd. has received a disclosure dated March 25, 2026 under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure was made by Amit M. Mehta, Cherry A. Mehta, Mohak A Mehta, Harsh A Mehta, S. Amit Specialty Chemicals Private Limited, Perfo Chem India Private Limited, Finorga (India) Private Limited, and two individuals named Pinakin Kantilal Patel and Surbhi Kishore Tanna. The acquisition involves shares carrying voting rights, shares in the nature of encumbrance, voting rights otherwise than by shares, warrants/convertible securities, and any other instrument that entitles the acquirer to receive shares carrying voting rights in the Target Company.

  • Diamines & Chemicals Ltd. received a disclosure under SEBI regulations
  • The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • The acquirers include Amit M. Mehta, Cherry A. Mehta, Mohak A Mehta, Harsh A Mehta, S. Amit Specialty Chemicals Private Limited, Perfo Chem India Private Limited, Finorga (India) Private Limited, Pinakin Kantilal Patel, and Surbhi Kishore Tanna
  • The acquisition involves shares carrying voting rights, shares in the nature of encumbrance, voting rights otherwise than by shares, warrants/convertible securities, and any other instrument that entitles the acquirer to receive shares carrying voting rights in the Target Company
  • The disclosure was received on March 25, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DIAMINES & CHEMICALS LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DIAMINESQ] Diamines & Chemicals Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window Until 48 Hours After FY2026 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Diamines & Chemicals Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons, immediate relatives of designated persons, and connected persons, effective April 01, 2026. The closure will remain in place until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting to consider the audited financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Diamines & Chemicals Ltd. to close trading window from April 01, 2026
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after FY2026 audited financial results
  • Board meeting date to be announced later
  • Applies to designated persons, immediate relatives, and connected persons

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DIAMINES & CHEMICALS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting
